title: Mobile Friendly Layout
description: As a User, I want to be able to comfortably use all features so that I can play in my games from my iPhone 13, Samsung Galaxy, or tablet.
notes: Tests written in spec/system/mobile_nav_spec.rb, mobile_posts_spec.rb, mobile_composer_spec.rb, tablet_gm_dashboard_spec.rb, mobile_email_links_spec.rb. Ruby runtime unavailable in this container — test execution must be verified in a full dev environment.

stories.title: Responsive navigation menu on mobile devices
stories.description: As a mobile user, I want the navigation menu to collapse into a hamburger menu on small screens so that I can access all site sections without horizontal scrolling or overlapping elements on my iPhone 13 or Samsung Galaxy.
acceptance_criteria: Navigation links collapse into a hamburger icon on screens narrower than 768px
Tapping the hamburger icon opens a full-width dropdown or slide-out menu
All navigation links are reachable and tappable with a minimum touch target of 44x44px
Menu closes when a link is selected or when tapping outside the menu

stories.title: Readable and scrollable game scene posts on mobile
stories.description: As a mobile user, I want to read and scroll through game scene posts comfortably so that I can follow the story and player contributions on my phone without zooming or horizontal scrolling.
acceptance_criteria: Post content reflows to fit within the viewport width on screens 375px and wider
Text is legible at default zoom (minimum 16px font size for body text)
Images within posts scale proportionally and do not overflow the container
Threaded reply indentation collapses or truncates gracefully on narrow screens

stories.title: Compose and submit posts from a mobile device
stories.description: As a mobile user, I want to write and submit new posts or replies using my phone's keyboard so that I can participate in games without needing a desktop computer.
acceptance_criteria: The post composition form is fully usable on screens 375px and wider
The text area expands as content is typed and does not hide behind the virtual keyboard
Submit and Cancel buttons are reachable and have touch targets of at least 44x44px
Rich-text controls (bold, italic, etc.) are accessible and usable on touch screens

stories.title: Game master tools accessible on tablet screens
stories.description: As a game master using a tablet, I want to access scene management, character management, and game settings so that I can run my game without switching to a desktop browser.
acceptance_criteria: All GM dashboard panels are reachable on screens 768px and wider (tablet portrait)
Action buttons (create scene, edit character, manage players) are tappable with no overlap
Forms for creating/editing scenes and characters are fully operable on tablet touch screens
No functionality is hidden or disabled based solely on screen size for tablet viewports

stories.title: Email notification links open correctly on mobile browsers
stories.description: As a mobile user, I want email notification links to open the correct in-game content in my mobile browser so that I can jump directly to new posts or scenes from my phone's email app.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a notification link from a mobile email client opens the target post or scene page
The linked page renders correctly in mobile viewport without requiring zoom
The user remains authenticated (or is prompted to log in) when following an email link on mobile
Deep-linked pages display the correct post or scene, not just the home page
